source_note: Keeper Rulebook, Rewards of Experience: The Investigator Development Phase (pp.94-95): skill ticks and improvement rolls are the mechanism by which investigators advance between sessions.

tick.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.94: a skill earns one tick for a successful use during play; no matter how many successes, only one check per skill. Cthulhu Mythos and Credit Rating never receive a skill check. A success bought by spending Luck points earns no improvement check (p.99).

improvement_roll.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.94: for each ticked skill roll 1D100; if the result is higher than the current skill, OR the result is over 95, the skill increases by 1D10. Skills may rise above 100% by this method.

sanity_reward.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.94: when a skill reaches 90% or more during an investigator development phase, add 2D6 points to current Sanity (discipline and self-esteem gained in mastering a skill).
